attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
BATCH_ID                      ,
VT_INTERFACE_ID               ,
SS_CODE                       ,
VT_STATUS                     ,
VT_STATUS_CODE                ,
VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID       ,
VT_TRANSACTION_TABLE          ,
VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE           ,
VT_TRANSACTION_CLASS          ,
VT_TRANSACTION_REF            ,
VT_TRANSACTION_ID             ,
VT_TRANSACTION_LINE           ,
VT_INTERNAL_ERROR_CODE        ,
VT_TRANSACTION_DATE           ,
VT_DATE_PROCESSED             ,
VT_REQUEST_ID                 ,
VT_TRANSACTION_GROUP          ,
VT_QUALIFIER1                 ,
VT_QUALIFIER2                 ,
VT_GROUPING_RULE_ID           ,
VT_LINKED_ROWID               ,
VT_CREATED_DATE               ,
VT_IC_PRICE                   ,
VT_IC_CURRENCY_CODE           ,
VT_IC_PRICING_METHOD_ID       ,
VT_IC_PRICING_CTL_ID          ,
ATTRIBUTE1                    ,
ATTRIBUTE2                    ,
ATTRIBUTE3                    ,
ATTRIBUTE4                    ,
ATTRIBUTE5                    ,
ATTRIBUTE6                    ,
ATTRIBUTE7                    ,
ATTRIBUTE8                    ,
ATTRIBUTE9                    ,
ATTRIBUTE10                   ,
ATTRIBUTE11                   ,
ATTRIBUTE12                   ,
ATTRIBUTE13                   ,
ATTRIBUTE14                   ,
ATTRIBUTE15                   ,
ATTRIBUTE16                   ,
ATTRIBUTE17                   ,
ATTRIBUTE18                   ,
ATTRIBUTE19                   ,
ATTRIBUTE20                   ,
ATTRIBUTE21                   ,
ATTRIBUTE22                   ,
CURRENCY_CODE                 ,
ENTERED_CR                    ,
ENTERED_DR                    ,
EXCHANGE_RATE_DATE            ,
ORG_ID                        ,
SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               ,
LEDGER_ID                     ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
CREATION_DATE                 ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE1         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE2         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE3         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE4         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE5         ,
VT_DIAGNOSTICS1               ,
VT_DIAGNOSTICS2               ,
VT_RELEASE_DATE               ,
CREATE_DATETIME               ,
ACTION_CODE                   ,
GES_UPDATE_DATE               ,
GLOBAL_NAME                   
FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_RT_INTERFACE_C3 EX
WHERE EXCEPTION_CD  = 'N_CUST_TRX'
      AND  EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1
FROM   $$STGDB.ST_CP_RT_INTERFACE_C3 SXRI
WHERE SXRI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = EX.VT_INTERFACE_ID
)

VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE           ,
VT_TRANSACTION_TABLE          ,
VT_TRANSACTION_REF            ,
VT_TRANSACTION_LINE           ,
VT_TRANSACTION_ID             ,
VT_TRANSACTION_GROUP          ,
VT_TRANSACTION_DATE           ,
VT_TRANSACTION_CLASS          ,
VT_STATUS_CODE                ,
VT_STATUS                     ,
VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID       ,
VT_RESULTS_LINE_NOTE9         ,
VT_RESULTS_LINE_NOTE8         ,
VT_RESULTS_LINE_NOTE7         ,
VT_RESULTS_LINE_NOTE6         ,
VT_RESULTS_LINE_NOTE5         ,
VT_RESULTS_LINE_NOTE4         ,

VT_RESULTS_LINE_NOTE2         ,
VT_RESULTS_LINE_NOTE10        ,
VT_RESULTS_LINE_NOTE1         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE9         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE8         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE7         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE6         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE50        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE5         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE49        ,

VT_IC_PRICING_CTL_ID          ,
VT_IC_PRICE                   ,
VT_IC_CURRENCY_CODE           ,

VT_DIAGNOSTICS1               ,

VT_CREATED_DATE               ,
SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               ,
ORG_ID                        ,

LAST_UPDATED_BY               ,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,
EXCHANGE_RATE_DATE            ,
ENTERED_DR                    ,
ENTERED_CR                    ,

ATTRIBUTE9                    ,

ATTRIBUTE6                    ,
ATTRIBUTE50                   ,

ATTRIBUTE42                   ,
ATTRIBUTE41                   ,
ATTRIBUTE40                   ,
ATTRIBUTE4                    ,
ATTRIBUTE39                   ,
ATTRIBUTE38                   ,
ATTRIBUTE37                   ,
ATTRIBUTE36                   ,
ATTRIBUTE35                   ,
ATTRIBUTE34                   ,
ATTRIBUTE33                   ,
ATTRIBUTE32                   ,
ATTRIBUTE31                   ,
ATTRIBUTE30                   ,
ATTRIBUTE3                    ,
ATTRIBUTE29                   ,
ATTRIBUTE28                   ,
ATTRIBUTE27                   ,
ATTRIBUTE26                   ,
ATTRIBUTE25                   ,
ATTRIBUTE24                   ,
ATTRIBUTE23                   ,
ATTRIBUTE22                   ,
ATTRIBUTE21                   ,
ATTRIBUTE20                   ,
ATTRIBUTE2                    ,
ATTRIBUTE19                   ,
ATTRIBUTE18                   ,
ATTRIBUTE17                   ,
ATTRIBUTE16                   ,
ATTRIBUTE15                   ,
ATTRIBUTE14                   ,
ATTRIBUTE13                   ,
ATTRIBUTE12                   ,
ATTRIBUTE11                   ,
ATTRIBUTE10                   ,
ATTRIBUTE1                    ,
BATCH_ID                      ,
ACTION_CD                     ,
CREATE_DATETIME               ,
SS_CODE                       ,
SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
REFRESH_DATETIME              
FROM  $$EXCEPDB.EX_XXCP_RT_INTERFACE_CG1 EX
WHERE EXCEPTION_CD = 'N_CUST_TRX'
  AND EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
AND NOT EXISTS (
SELECT 1
FROM   $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_RT_INTERFACE_CG1 SXRI
WHERE SXRI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = EX.VT_INTERFACE_ID
)

SELECT
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY               ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_VALUATION_ADJ_PCT     ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD   ,
OUTQRY.SHIPMENT_LEG_TYPE_CD          ,
OUTQRY.BUNDLED_TYPE                  ,
OUTQRY.TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_TRX_AMT     ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMER_DISCOUNT_TRX_AMT     ,
OUTQRY.FORWARD_REVERSE_TYPE          ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_PROCESSING_END_DT     ,
OUTQRY.COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_ROLE       ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION_CREATED_DT,
OUTQRY.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT        ,
OUTQRY.SS_CD                         ,
OUTQRY.EXPORT_COUNTRY_CD             ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_VALUATION_USD_AMT     ,
OUTQRY.IMPORT_COUNTRY_CD             ,
OUTQRY.BK_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD_CD  ,
OUTQRY.FINAL_LEG_FLG                 ,
OUTQRY.RU_PRINT_ON_COMERCIAL_INV_FLG ,
OUTQRY.RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_NOTE_1_TXT  ,
OUTQRY.RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_NOTE_2_TXT  ,
OUTQRY.RU_PRORATION_METHOD_CD        ,
OUTQRY.RU_CUSTOMS_VLTN_ROLL_UP_FLG   ,
OUTQRY.RU_UNIT_UPLIFT_PCT            ,
OUTQRY.RU_DSTN_SUB_INVENTORY_CD      ,
OUTQRY.RU_BIZ_ORGANIZATION_TYPE_CD   ,
OUTQRY.RU_REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_KEY      ,
OUTQRY.RU_ACQUISITION_COUNTRY_CD     ,
OUTQRY.RU_PROVENANCE_COUNTRY_CD      ,
OUTQRY.RU_BREAKOUT_OPTION_CD         ,
OUTQRY.RU_CUSTOMS_DOC_REQUIRED_CNT   ,
OUTQRY.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
OUTQRY.RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_VERSION_CD  ,
OUTQRY.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
OUTQRY.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
OUTQRY.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
OUTQRY.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
OUTQRY.EP_VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
OUTQRY.RU_EP_SHIP_TO_COUNTRY_CD      ,
OUTQRY.RU_AVG_COUNTRY_DISCOUNT_PCT   ,
OUTQRY.RU_CMRC_INVC_VLTN_TRX_AMT     ,
OUTQRY.RU_CMRC_INVC_VLTN_RULE_NAME   ,
OUTQRY.RU_CMRC_INVC_IMPRT_REC_TYPE_CD,
OUTQRY.RU_ULTMT_SHP_TO_INV_SVC_ORG_ID,
OUTQRY.RU_TYPE_4_ROLE                ,
OUTQRY.RU_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD     ,
OUTQRY.RU_CSTM_TRXTOINV_CUR_CNVRSN_RT,
OUTQRY.RU_TYP_4_ENTY_TRX_ISO_CRNCY_CD,
OUTQRY.LATEST_TRANSACTION_FLG,
OUTQRY.RU_FORWARD_LOGISTICS_TYPE,
OUTQRY.RU_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
OUTQRY.RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
OUTQRY.RU_BK_REQUEST_NUM,
OUTQRY.RU_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
OUTQRY.RU_SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY,
'I'  AS ACTION_CODE           ,
(CASE WHEN NCT_W.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END) AS DML_TYPE                      
FROM 
(
SELECT
SM.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY            ,
COALESCE(CTA.ADJUSTMENT_RATE,0.0) AS CUSTOMS_VALUATION_ADJ_PCT     ,
(CASE WHEN SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_TABLE = 'MFG_CV' THEN 'CUSTOMS VALUATION'  
	  WHEN SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_TABLE = 'MFG_DB' THEN 'DUTY BILLING'  
	  WHEN SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_TABLE = 'I2R_CV' THEN 'ISSUE TO RESOLUTION CUSTOMS VALUATION' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD,
SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE  AS SHIPMENT_LEG_TYPE_CD,
'UNKNOWN'           AS BUNDLED_TYPE                  ,
SCRI.ATTRIBUTE16    AS TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_TRX_AMT     ,
SCRI.ATTRIBUTE12      AS CUSTOMER_DISCOUNT_TRX_AMT     ,
'REVERSE LOGISTICS'   AS FORWARD_REVERSE_TYPE          ,
CAST(NULL AS DATE)    AS CUSTOMS_PROCESSING_END_DT     ,
'N'                   AS COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_ROLE,
COALESCE(SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_DATE, DATE'3500-01-01')  AS CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION_CREATED_DT,
SM.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
SM.SS_CD                  AS SS_CD,
COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')   AS EXPORT_COUNTRY_CD             ,
CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,7))   			  AS CUSTOMS_VALUATION_USD_AMT     ,
COALESCE(NIC1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')  AS IMPORT_COUNTRY_CD             ,
COALESCE(ECPM.BK_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD_CD,'UNKNOWN')      AS BK_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD_CD  ,
COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE13,'N')            AS FINAL_LEG_FLG				   ,
'N'                                       AS RU_PRINT_ON_COMERCIAL_INV_FLG 		   ,
CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(100))      AS RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_NOTE_1_TXT  		   ,
CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(100))      AS RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_NOTE_2_TXT  		   ,
'UNKNOWN'                       AS RU_PRORATION_METHOD_CD        	   ,
'N'                             AS RU_CUSTOMS_VLTN_ROLL_UP_FLG   	   ,
COALESCE(SCRI.VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE5,-999)      AS RU_UNIT_UPLIFT_PCT            ,
COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE19,'UNKNOWN')          AS RU_DSTN_SUB_INVENTORY_CD,
COALESCE(SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')  AS RU_BIZ_ORGANIZATION_TYPE_CD,
COALESCE(NROL.REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-999)     AS RU_REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_KEY      ,
COALESCE(NIC2.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')     AS RU_ACQUISITION_COUNTRY_CD,
COALESCE(NIC3.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')     AS RU_PROVENANCE_COUNTRY_CD      ,
'UNKNOWN'     AS RU_BREAKOUT_OPTION_CD		   ,
0             AS RU_CUSTOMS_DOC_REQUIRED_CNT   ,
-9999          AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY	   ,
'UNKNOWN'     AS RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_VERSION_CD  ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
USER                 AS EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
USER                 AS EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
SCRI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID AS EP_VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE15,'UNKNOWN')  AS RU_EP_SHIP_TO_COUNTRY_CD,
CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS RU_AVG_COUNTRY_DISCOUNT_PCT,
CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_CMRC_INVC_VLTN_TRX_AMT,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_CMRC_INVC_VLTN_RULE_NAME,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_CMRC_INVC_IMPRT_REC_TYPE_CD  ,
COALESCE(NISO.BK_INVENTORY_SERVICE_ORG_ID,-999) AS RU_ULTMT_SHP_TO_INV_SVC_ORG_ID ,
'N' AS RU_TYPE_4_ROLE          ,      
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,     
CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_CSTM_TRXTOINV_CUR_CNVRSN_RT,
'UNK' AS RU_TYP_4_ENTY_TRX_ISO_CRNCY_CD,
(CASE WHEN NROL.REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS LATEST_TRANSACTION_FLG,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_FORWARD_LOGISTICS_TYPE,
-999 AS RU_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
-9999 AS RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_BK_REQUEST_NUM,
-999 AS RU_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
-999 AS RU_SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY  

FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CP_RT_INTERFACE_C3 SCRI

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION SM
ON 
(
 SCRI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SM.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
 AND SCRI.SS_CODE = SM.SS_CD
)

 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD ECPM
 ON (ECPM.EP_PRICE_METHOD_ID_INT = COALESCE(SCRI.VT_IC_PRICING_METHOD_ID,-777)
     AND ECPM.BK_SS_CD = 'C3')
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
 ON (NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE14,'UN'))
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC1
 ON (NIC1.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE15,'UN'))
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC2
 ON (NIC2.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE =  COALESCE(SCRI.VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE3,'UN'))
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC3
 ON (NIC3.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE3,'UN'))

LEFT OUTER JOIN 
      ( SELECT INTERFACE_ID,SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,ADJUSTMENT_RATE 
	      FROM  (
		         SELECT INTERFACE_ID,SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,ADJUSTMENT_RATE,1 AS PRIORITY
                 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_C3
                   UNION ALL
                 SELECT INTERFACE_ID,SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,ADJUSTMENT_RATE,2 AS PRIORITY
                  FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_TRANS_ATTR_ALL_CUSTOMS ECTAAC 
                 WHERE SS_CODE = 'C3'
                   AND EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
                 UNION ALL
                 SELECT SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,EP_VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,CUSTOMS_VALUATION_ADJ_PCT, 3 AS PRIORITY
                  FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT_IN
                 WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1
	                             FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CP_RT_INTERFACE_C3 SCRI_IN
	                            WHERE NCT_IN.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SCRI_IN.VT_INTERFACE_ID
	                              AND NCT_IN.EP_VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT = SCRI_IN.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
								  AND NCT_IN.BK_SS_CD = SCRI_IN.SS_CODE
                                )
                 ) CTA_IQ
                 QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY INTERFACE_ID,SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID ORDER BY PRIORITY ASC)=1
      ) CTA
ON ( 
SCRI.VT_INTERFACE_ID =CTA.INTERFACE_ID
AND SCRI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID=CTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
)

 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_REPAIR_ORDER_LINE NROL
 ON (NROL.SK_LINE_ID_INT = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE2,-999))
 
 LEFT OUTER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_INVENTORY_SERVICE_ORG NISO
 ON (NISO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE22,-999))

 WHERE SCRI.VT_STATUS='SUCCESSFUL'
 
) OUTQRY

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT_W
ON (OUTQRY.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = NCT_W.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
AND OUTQRY.SS_CD  = NCT_W.BK_SS_CD
)

SELECT
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY               ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_VALUATION_ADJ_PCT     ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD   ,
OUTQRY.SHIPMENT_LEG_TYPE_CD          ,
OUTQRY.BUNDLED_TYPE                  ,
OUTQRY.TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_TRX_AMT     ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMER_DISCOUNT_TRX_AMT     ,
OUTQRY.FORWARD_REVERSE_TYPE          ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_PROCESSING_END_DT     ,
OUTQRY.COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_ROLE       ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION_CREATED_DT,
OUTQRY.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT        ,
OUTQRY.SS_CD                         ,
OUTQRY.EXPORT_COUNTRY_CD             ,
OUTQRY.CUSTOMS_VALUATION_USD_AMT     ,
OUTQRY.IMPORT_COUNTRY_CD             ,
OUTQRY.BK_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD_CD  ,
OUTQRY.FINAL_LEG_FLG                 ,
OUTQRY.RU_PRINT_ON_COMERCIAL_INV_FLG ,
OUTQRY.RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_NOTE_1_TXT  ,
OUTQRY.RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_NOTE_2_TXT  ,
OUTQRY.RU_PRORATION_METHOD_CD        ,
OUTQRY.RU_CUSTOMS_VLTN_ROLL_UP_FLG   ,
OUTQRY.RU_UNIT_UPLIFT_PCT            ,
OUTQRY.RU_DSTN_SUB_INVENTORY_CD      ,
OUTQRY.RU_BIZ_ORGANIZATION_TYPE_CD   ,
OUTQRY.RU_REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_KEY      ,
OUTQRY.RU_ACQUISITION_COUNTRY_CD     ,
OUTQRY.RU_PROVENANCE_COUNTRY_CD      ,
OUTQRY.RU_BREAKOUT_OPTION_CD         ,
OUTQRY.RU_CUSTOMS_DOC_REQUIRED_CNT   ,
OUTQRY.RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY       ,
OUTQRY.RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_VERSION_CD  ,
OUTQRY.EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
OUTQRY.EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
OUTQRY.EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
OUTQRY.EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
OUTQRY.EP_VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
OUTQRY.RU_EP_SHIP_TO_COUNTRY_CD      ,
OUTQRY.RU_AVG_COUNTRY_DISCOUNT_PCT   ,
OUTQRY.RU_CMRC_INVC_VLTN_TRX_AMT     ,
OUTQRY.RU_CMRC_INVC_VLTN_RULE_NAME   ,
OUTQRY.RU_CMRC_INVC_IMPRT_REC_TYPE_CD,
OUTQRY.RU_ULTMT_SHP_TO_INV_SVC_ORG_ID,
OUTQRY.RU_TYPE_4_ROLE                ,
OUTQRY.RU_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD     ,
OUTQRY.RU_CSTM_TRXTOINV_CUR_CNVRSN_RT,
OUTQRY.RU_TYP_4_ENTY_TRX_ISO_CRNCY_CD,
OUTQRY.LATEST_TRANSACTION_FLG,
OUTQRY.RU_FORWARD_LOGISTICS_TYPE,
OUTQRY.RU_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
OUTQRY.RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
OUTQRY.RU_BK_REQUEST_NUM,
OUTQRY.RU_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
OUTQRY.RU_SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY,
'I'  AS ACTION_CODE           ,
(CASE WHEN NCT_W.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT IS NULL THEN 'I' ELSE 'U' END) AS DML_TYPE                      
FROM 
(
SELECT
SM.CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY            ,
COALESCE(CTA.ADJUSTMENT_RATE,0.0) AS CUSTOMS_VALUATION_ADJ_PCT     ,
(CASE WHEN SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_TABLE = 'MFG_CV' THEN 'CUSTOMS VALUATION'  
WHEN SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_TABLE = 'MFG_DB' THEN 'DUTY BILLING'  
WHEN SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_TABLE = 'I2R_CV' THEN 'ISSUE TO RESOLUTION CUSTOMS VALUATION' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) 
AS CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION_TYPE_CD   ,
COALESCE(SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE,'UNKNOWN')  AS SHIPMENT_LEG_TYPE_CD          ,
(CASE WHEN ATTRIBUTE32='TPB' THEN 'BUNDLED' WHEN ATTRIBUTE32 IN ('TNC','STD','ATO') THEN 'NONBUNDLED' ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) 
AS BUNDLED_TYPE                  ,
CAST(SUBSTR(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE16,1,34) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS TRADE_IN_DISCOUNT_TRX_AMT     ,
CAST(SUBSTR(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE12,1,34) AS DECIMAL(26,7))  AS CUSTOMER_DISCOUNT_TRX_AMT     ,
'FORWARD LOGISTICS'       AS FORWARD_REVERSE_TYPE          ,
CAST(CAST(VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE9 AS TIMESTAMP(0) FORMAT 'DD-MMM-YYBHH.MI.SSBT') AS DATE)  AS CUSTOMS_PROCESSING_END_DT     ,
(CASE WHEN ATTRIBUTE32='TPB' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS COMMERCIAL_INVOICE_ROLE,
COALESCE(SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_DATE, DATE'3500-01-01')  AS CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION_CREATED_DT,
SM.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
SM.SS_CD                  AS SS_CD,
COALESCE(NIC.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')  AS EXPORT_COUNTRY_CD             ,
CAST(SUBSTR(SCRI.VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE10,1,34) AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS CUSTOMS_VALUATION_USD_AMT     ,
COALESCE(NIC1.BK_ISO_COUNTRY_CODE,'UNK')  AS IMPORT_COUNTRY_CD             ,
COALESCE(ECPM.BK_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD_CD,'UNKNOWN')      AS BK_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD_CD,
COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE13,'N')            AS FINAL_LEG_FLG,
COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE35,'N')   AS RU_PRINT_ON_COMERCIAL_INV_FLG ,
SCRI.VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE11      AS RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_NOTE_1_TXT  ,
SCRI.VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE12      AS RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_NOTE_2_TXT  ,
COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE38,'UNKNOWN')  AS RU_PRORATION_METHOD_CD        ,
COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE36,'N')        AS RU_CUSTOMS_VLTN_ROLL_UP_FLG   ,
-999          AS RU_UNIT_UPLIFT_PCT            ,
'UNKNOWN'     AS RU_DSTN_SUB_INVENTORY_CD      ,
'UNKNOWN'     AS RU_BIZ_ORGANIZATION_TYPE_CD   ,
-999          AS RU_REPAIR_ORDER_LINE_KEY      ,
'UNKNOWN'     AS RU_ACQUISITION_COUNTRY_CD     ,
'UNKNOWN'     AS RU_PROVENANCE_COUNTRY_CD      ,
(CASE WHEN SCRI.ATTRIBUTE33='F' THEN 'FULL' 
WHEN SCRI.ATTRIBUTE33='P' THEN 'PARTIAL' 
WHEN SCRI.ATTRIBUTE33='N' THEN 'NO' 
ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS RU_BREAKOUT_OPTION_CD,
COALESCE(SCRI.VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE4,0)  AS RU_CUSTOMS_DOC_REQUIRED_CNT   ,
COALESCE(SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,-9999) AS RU_SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY,
(CASE WHEN SCRI.ATTRIBUTE33 IN ('A','B','C','D') THEN SCRI.ATTRIBUTE33 ELSE 'UNKNOWN' END) AS RU_COMMERCIAL_INV_VERSION_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM                ,
USER                 AS EDW_CREATE_USER               ,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_UPDATE_DTM                ,
USER                 AS EDW_UPDATE_USER               ,
SCRI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID AS EP_VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,
COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE15,'UNKNOWN')  AS RU_EP_SHIP_TO_COUNTRY_CD,
CAST(ECAR.RATE_DISPLAYED AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS RU_AVG_COUNTRY_DISCOUNT_PCT,
CAST(SCRI.VT_IC_PRICE AS DECIMAL(26,7)) AS RU_CMRC_INVC_VLTN_TRX_AMT,
COALESCE(VT_DIAGNOSTICS1,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_CMRC_INVC_VLTN_RULE_NAME,
'UNKNOWN' AS RU_CMRC_INVC_IMPRT_REC_TYPE_CD ,
-999 AS RU_ULTMT_SHP_TO_INV_SVC_ORG_ID,
(CASE WHEN SCTR.ATTRIBUTE1 = 'TYPE4' THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS RU_TYPE_4_ROLE,
COALESCE(NCOU.BK_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CODE,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_OPERATING_UNIT_NAME_CD,
(CASE WHEN SCTR.ATTRIBUTE1 = 'TYPE4' THEN CAST(CAST(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE17 AS VARCHAR(34)) AS DECIMAL(26,17)) ELSE CAST(NULL AS DECIMAL(26,17)) END) AS RU_CSTM_TRXTOINV_CUR_CNVRSN_RT,
COALESCE(NI_CURR.BK_ISO_CURRENCY_CODE,'UNK') AS  RU_TYP_4_ENTY_TRX_ISO_CRNCY_CD,
(CASE WHEN SOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY IS NULL THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END) AS LATEST_TRANSACTION_FLG,
(CASE WHEN SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE NOT IN ('PICKED','PINV') 
AND SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_TABLE  = 'MFG_CV' THEN 'MAKE' ELSE 'DELIVERY' END) AS RU_FORWARD_LOGISTICS_TYPE,
COALESCE(SOL.SHIP_SET_NUMBER_INT,-999) AS RU_SHIPSET_NUM_INT,
COALESCE(SOL.SALES_ORDER_KEY,-9999) AS RU_SALES_ORDER_KEY,
COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE2,'UNKNOWN') AS RU_BK_REQUEST_NUM,
COALESCE(NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,-999) AS RU_INVENTORY_ORG_KEY,
COALESCE(NSLSDD.SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY,-999) AS RU_SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY  
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_RT_INTERFACE_CG1 SCRI
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.SM_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION SM
ON 
(
SCRI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SM.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
AND 'CG' = SM.SS_CD
)

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD ECPM
ON (ECPM.EP_PRICE_METHOD_ID_INT =COALESCE(SCRI.VT_IC_PRICING_METHOD_ID,-999)
AND ECPM.BK_SS_CD = 'CG')

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES ECAR
ON (ECAR.RATE_SET_ID = 8                  
AND ECAR.OWNER = SCRI.ATTRIBUTE15               
AND  SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_DATE BETWEEN COALESCE(ECAR.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE,DATE'2000-01-01') AND COALESCE(ECAR.EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE,DATE'3999-01-01')
AND ECAR.SS_CODE = 'CG')	


LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
ON (NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE14,'UN'))
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC1
ON (NIC1.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE15,'UN'))

LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SELECT INTERFACE_ID,SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,ADJUSTMENT_RATE 
FROM  (
SELECT INTERFACE_ID,SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,ADJUSTMENT_RATE,1 AS PRIORITY
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_CG1
UNION ALL
SELECT INTERFACE_ID,SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID,ADJUSTMENT_RATE,2 AS PRIORITY
FROM $$EXCEPDB.EX_CP_TRANS_ATTR_ALL_CUSTOMS ECTAAC 
WHERE SS_CODE = 'CG1'
AND EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI'
UNION ALL
SELECT SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,EP_VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT,CUSTOMS_VALUATION_ADJ_PCT, 3 AS PRIORITY
FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT_IN
WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_RT_INTERFACE_CG1 SCRI_IN
WHERE NCT_IN.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SCRI_IN.VT_INTERFACE_ID
AND NCT_IN.EP_VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT = SCRI_IN.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
AND NCT_IN.BK_SS_CD = 'CG'
)
) CTA_IQ
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY INTERFACE_ID,SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID ORDER BY PRIORITY ASC)=1
) CTA 
ON ( SCRI.VT_INTERFACE_ID =CTA.INTERFACE_ID
AND SCRI.VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID=CTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID
)
LEFT OUTER JOIN 
( SELECT  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,EL_CG1_SOL.LINE_ID,SHIP_SET_NUMBER_INT,SALES_ORDER_KEY
FROM   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT EL_CG1_SOL
ON (      NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= COALESCE(EL_CG1_SOL.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID,EL_CG1_SOL.LINE_ID)
AND NSOL.SS_CODE = (CASE WHEN EL_CG1_SOL.CMS_SOURCE_CODE LIKE '%SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN 'QTC'  
WHEN EL_CG1_SOL.CMS_SOURCE_CODE LIKE '%BV.CISCO.COM' THEN 'BV' ELSE 'CG' END)
)
) SOL
ON (SOL.LINE_ID = SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_ID)

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
ON (NCIO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT = SCRI.ATTRIBUTE21)

LEFT OUTER JOIN
(
SELECT ATTRIBUTE4,SOL_SHIPMENT_DELIVERY_KEY
FROM $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL NSO,
(
SELECT ATTRIBUTE4 
FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_RT_INTERFACE_CG1 
GROUP BY 1
) SCRI
WHERE NSO.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT=SCRI.ATTRIBUTE4
GROUP BY 1,2
) NSLSDD
ON ( NSLSDD.ATTRIBUTE4 = SCRI.ATTRIBUTE4 ) 

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_CP_TAX_REGISTRATIONS SCTR
ON (CAST(SCTR.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DECIMAL(20,0)) = SCRI.ORG_ID 
AND SCTR.ATTRIBUTE1 = 'TYPE4'
AND SCTR.ACTIVE = 'Y')

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
ON (NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  = SCRI.ORG_ID
AND OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'CISCO')

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY NI_CURR
ON ( NI_CURR.SK_CURRENCY_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.VT_IC_CURRENCY_CODE,'-99'))

WHERE SCRI.VT_STATUS='SUCCESSFUL'

) OUTQRY

LEFT OUTER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT_W
ON (OUTQRY.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = NCT_W.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
AND OUTQRY.SS_CD  = NCT_W.BK_SS_CD
)

VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE22        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE21        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE20        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE2         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE19        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE18        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE17        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE16        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE15        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE14        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE13        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE12        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE11        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE10        ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE1         ,
VT_REQUEST_ID                 ,
VT_RELEASE_DATE               ,
VT_QUALIFIER2                 ,
VT_QUALIFIER1                 ,
VT_PARENT_TRX_ID              ,
VT_INTERNAL_ERROR_CODE        ,
VT_INTERFACE_ID               ,
VT_IC_PRICING_METHOD_ID       ,
VT_IC_PRICING_CTL_ID          ,
VT_IC_PRICE                   ,
VT_IC_CURRENCY_CODE           ,
VT_GROUPING_RULE_ID           ,
VT_DIAGNOSTICS2               ,
VT_DIAGNOSTICS1               ,
VT_DATE_PROCESSED             ,
VT_CREATED_DATE               ,
SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               ,
ORG_ID                        ,
LEDGER_ID                     ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               ,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,
EXCHANGE_RATE_DATE            ,
ENTERED_DR                    ,
ENTERED_CR                    ,
CURRENCY_CODE                 ,
CREATION_DATE                 ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
ATTRIBUTE9                    ,
ATTRIBUTE8                    ,
ATTRIBUTE7                    ,
ATTRIBUTE6                    ,
ATTRIBUTE50                   ,
ATTRIBUTE5                    ,
ATTRIBUTE49                   ,
ATTRIBUTE48                   ,
ATTRIBUTE47                   ,
ATTRIBUTE46                   ,
ATTRIBUTE45                   ,
ATTRIBUTE44                   ,
ATTRIBUTE43                   ,
ATTRIBUTE42                   ,
ATTRIBUTE41                   ,
ATTRIBUTE40                   ,
ATTRIBUTE4                    ,
ATTRIBUTE39                   ,
ATTRIBUTE38                   ,
ATTRIBUTE37                   ,
ATTRIBUTE36                   ,
ATTRIBUTE35                   ,
ATTRIBUTE34                   ,
ATTRIBUTE33                   ,
ATTRIBUTE32                   ,
ATTRIBUTE31                   ,
ATTRIBUTE30                   ,
ATTRIBUTE3                    ,
ATTRIBUTE29                   ,
ATTRIBUTE28                   ,
ATTRIBUTE27                   ,
ATTRIBUTE26                   ,
ATTRIBUTE25                   ,
ATTRIBUTE24                   ,
ATTRIBUTE23                   ,
ATTRIBUTE22                   ,
ATTRIBUTE21                   ,
ATTRIBUTE20                   ,
ATTRIBUTE2                    ,
ATTRIBUTE19                   ,
ATTRIBUTE18                   ,
ATTRIBUTE17                   ,
ATTRIBUTE16                   ,
ATTRIBUTE15                   ,
ATTRIBUTE14                   ,
ATTRIBUTE13                   ,
ATTRIBUTE12                   ,
ATTRIBUTE11                   ,
ATTRIBUTE10                   ,
ATTRIBUTE1                    ,
BATCH_ID                      ,
ACTION_CD                     ,
CREATE_DATETIME               ,
SS_CODE                       ,
'N_CUST_TRX'  AS EXCEPTION_CD ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE,
SOURCE_DML_TYPE,
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
REFRESH_DATETIME              
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_RT_INTERFACE_CG1 SCRI
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
 (
  SELECT 1
 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION SM

INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD ECPM
ON (ECPM.EP_PRICE_METHOD_ID_INT =COALESCE(SCRI.VT_IC_PRICING_METHOD_ID,-999)
    AND ECPM.BK_SS_CD = 'CG')

INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CP_ADJUSTMENT_RATES ECAR
ON (ECAR.RATE_SET_ID = 8                  
       AND ECAR.OWNER = SCRI.ATTRIBUTE15               
       AND  SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_DATE BETWEEN COALESCE(ECAR.EFFECTIVE_FROM_DATE,DATE'2000-01-01') AND COALESCE(ECAR.EFFECTIVE_TO_DATE,DATE'3999-01-01')
	AND ECAR.SS_CODE = 'CG')	

 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
	ON (NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE14,'UN'))
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC1
	ON (NIC1.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE15,'UN'))
 INNER JOIN
	(
	 SELECT DISTINCT NDEL.DELIVERY_ID,DDTL.DELIVERY_NAME 
	 FROM 
		 $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_NEW_DELIVERIES NDEL,
		 $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_WSH_DELIVERY_ASSIGNM  DELA,
		 $$INVFLMTVWDB.N_SO_LINE_SHPMNT_DELIVERY_DTL DDTL
	 WHERE  DELA.DELIVERY_ID=NDEL.DELIVERY_ID
		 AND DELA.GLOBAL_NAME='CG'
		 AND DDTL.SK_DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID_INT=DELA.DELIVERY_DETAIL_ID
	 UNION /* Dummy deafult record as no default record in the EL table */
	 SELECT -999 AS DELIVERY_ID,
		'UNKNOWN' AS DELIVERY_NAME
	 FROM $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD 
	 WHERE BK_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD_CD = 'UNKNOWN' 
	) NDEL1
	ON (NDEL1.DELIVERY_ID = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE2,-999))

 INNER JOIN  
( SELECT  NSOL.SALES_ORDER_LINE_KEY ,EL_CG1_SOL.LINE_ID
       FROM   $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_LINE_TV NSOL
       INNER JOIN $$ETLVWDB.EL_CG1_XXGCO_OE_ORD_LINES_EXT EL_CG1_SOL
       ON (
       NSOL.SK_SO_LINE_ID_INT= EL_CG1_SOL.CMS_SOURCE_LINE_ID  
        AND NSOL.SS_CODE = (CASE WHEN EL_CG1_SOL.CMS_SOURCE_CODE LIKE '%SJOE.CISCO.COM' THEN 'QTC'  
                                 WHEN EL_CG1_SOL.CMS_SOURCE_CODE LIKE '%BV.CISCO.COM' THEN 'BV' END)
          )
   ) SOL
	ON (SOL.LINE_ID = SCRI.VT_TRANSACTION_ID)

 /*	
 INNER JOIN $$STGDB.ST_CP_TAX_REGISTRATIONS SCTR
	 ON (CAST(SCTR.ATTRIBUTE2 AS DECIMAL(20,0))= SCRI.ORG_ID 
	 AND SCTR.ATTRIBUTE1 = 'TYPE4'
	 AND SCTR.ACTIVE = 'Y')
 */
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_OPERATING_UNIT NCOU
	ON (NCOU.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  = SCRI.ORG_ID
	AND OPERATING_UNIT_TYPE_CD = 'CISCO')
 
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_CURRENCY NI_CURR
	ON ( NI_CURR.SK_CURRENCY_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.VT_IC_CURRENCY_CODE,'-99'))                  

 WHERE SCRI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SM.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
	AND 'CG' = SM.SS_CD
 
 )

SELECT
CTA.ATTRIBUTE_ID          ,        
CTA.HEADER_ID             ,       
CTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID  ,        
CTA.PARENT_TRX_ID         ,        
CTA.TRANSACTION_ID        ,        
CTA.INTERFACE_ID          ,        
CTA.ADJUSTMENT_RATE       ,        
CTA.TRANSACTION_DATE      ,        
CTA.CREATION_DATE         ,        
CTA.LAST_UPDATED_BY       ,        
CTA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE      ,        
CTA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN     ,        
SOURCE_DML_TYPE       ,        
SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,        
REFRESH_DATETIME,        
'CG1' AS SS_CODE,        
CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATE_DATETIME,        
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE                
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_CG1  CTA
 WHERE SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID IN (1,5,7,9,10,101)
 AND  NOT EXISTS
(
 SELECT 1 
 FROM   $$WORKDB.W_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT
 WHERE  NCT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = CTA.INTERFACE_ID
   AND  CTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = NCT.EP_VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT
   AND  NCT.BK_SS_CD = 'CG1'
)

UNION ALL

SELECT
CTA.ATTRIBUTE_ID          ,        
CTA.HEADER_ID             ,       
CTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID  ,        
CTA.PARENT_TRX_ID         ,        
CTA.TRANSACTION_ID        ,        
CTA.INTERFACE_ID          ,        
CTA.ADJUSTMENT_RATE       ,        
CTA.TRANSACTION_DATE      ,        
CTA.CREATION_DATE         ,        
CTA.LAST_UPDATED_BY       ,        
CTA.LAST_UPDATE_DATE      ,        
CTA.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN     ,        
 CAST(NULL AS VARCHAR(30)) AS SOURCE_DML_TYPE       ,        
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,        
 CAST(NULL AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS REFRESH_DATETIME,        
'C3' AS SS_CODE,        
CREATE_DATETIME,        
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE                
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CP_TRNSACTION_ATTR_C3 CTA
 WHERE SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID IN (2,9,10)
 AND NOT EXISTS
(
 SELECT 1 
 FROM   $$WORKDB.W_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION NCT
 WHERE  NCT.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = CTA.INTERFACE_ID
   AND  CTA.SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID = NCT.EP_VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID_INT
   AND  NCT.BK_SS_CD = 'C3'
)

BATCH_ID                      ,
VT_INTERFACE_ID               ,
SS_CODE                       ,
VT_STATUS                     ,
VT_STATUS_CODE                ,
VT_SOURCE_ASSIGNMENT_ID       ,
VT_TRANSACTION_TABLE          ,
VT_TRANSACTION_TYPE           ,
VT_TRANSACTION_CLASS          ,
VT_TRANSACTION_REF            ,
VT_TRANSACTION_ID             ,
VT_TRANSACTION_LINE           ,
VT_INTERNAL_ERROR_CODE        ,
VT_TRANSACTION_DATE           ,
VT_DATE_PROCESSED             ,
VT_REQUEST_ID                 ,
VT_TRANSACTION_GROUP          ,
VT_QUALIFIER1                 ,
VT_QUALIFIER2                 ,
VT_GROUPING_RULE_ID           ,
VT_LINKED_ROWID               ,
VT_CREATED_DATE               ,
VT_IC_PRICE                   ,
VT_IC_CURRENCY_CODE           ,
VT_IC_PRICING_METHOD_ID       ,
VT_IC_PRICING_CTL_ID          ,
ATTRIBUTE1                    ,
ATTRIBUTE2                    ,
ATTRIBUTE3                    ,
ATTRIBUTE4                    ,
ATTRIBUTE5                    ,
ATTRIBUTE6                    ,
ATTRIBUTE7                    ,
ATTRIBUTE8                    ,
ATTRIBUTE9                    ,
ATTRIBUTE10                   ,
ATTRIBUTE11                   ,
ATTRIBUTE12                   ,
ATTRIBUTE13                   ,
ATTRIBUTE14                   ,
ATTRIBUTE15                   ,
ATTRIBUTE16                   ,
ATTRIBUTE17                   ,
ATTRIBUTE18                   ,
ATTRIBUTE19                   ,
ATTRIBUTE20                   ,
ATTRIBUTE21                   ,
ATTRIBUTE22                   ,
CURRENCY_CODE                 ,
ENTERED_CR                    ,
ENTERED_DR                    ,
EXCHANGE_RATE_DATE            ,
ORG_ID                        ,
SET_OF_BOOKS_ID               ,
LEDGER_ID                     ,
CREATED_BY                    ,
CREATION_DATE                 ,
LAST_UPDATED_BY               ,
LAST_UPDATE_DATE              ,
LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN             ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE1         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE2         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE3         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE4         ,
VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE5         ,
VT_DIAGNOSTICS1               ,
VT_DIAGNOSTICS2               ,
VT_RELEASE_DATE               ,
CREATE_DATETIME               ,
ACTION_CODE                   ,
GES_UPDATE_DATE               ,
GLOBAL_NAME                   ,
'N_CUST_TRX' AS EXCEPTION_CD  ,
'RI' AS EXCEPTION_TYPE                               
FROM  $$STGDB.ST_CP_RT_INTERFACE_C3 SCRI
 WHERE NOT EXISTS
 (
 SELECT 1
   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION SM

 INNER JOIN $$FINLGLVWDB.N_CUSTOMS_PRICING_METHOD ECPM
 ON (ECPM.EP_PRICE_METHOD_ID_INT = COALESCE(SCRI.VT_IC_PRICING_METHOD_ID,-777)
     AND ECPM.BK_SS_CD = 'C3')

 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC
	ON (NIC.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE14,'UN'))
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC1
	ON (NIC1.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE15,'UN'))
/* INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC2
 ON (NIC2.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE = COALESCE(SCRI.VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE3,'UN'))
 INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ISO_COUNTRY NIC3
 ON (NIC3.ISO_COUNTRY_SHORT_CODE =  COALESCE(SCRI.VT_RESULTS_ATTRIBUTE4,'UN'))
*/  
  INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_REPAIR_ORDER_LINE NROL
	ON (NROL.SK_LINE_ID_INT = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE2,-999))
 
 INNER JOIN $$SERVICEVWDB.N_INVENTORY_SERVICE_ORG NISO
	ON (NISO.SK_ORGANIZATION_ID_INT  = COALESCE(SCRI.ATTRIBUTE22,-999))                      

 WHERE SCRI.VT_INTERFACE_ID = SM.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
  AND SCRI.SS_CODE = SM.SS_CD
 
 )

SELECT 
	(RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SXRI.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,SXRI.SS_CD) + SM.MAX_KEY) AS CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY,
	SXRI.SS_CD,
	SXRI.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
	CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) AS EDW_CREATE_DTM,
	USER AS EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM 
	(
		SELECT 
			ST_RT_C3.VT_INTERFACE_ID AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
			CAST(ST_RT_C3.SS_CODE AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_CD
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_CP_RT_INTERFACE_C3 ST_RT_C3
		UNION ALL
		SELECT 
			ST_RT_CG1.VT_INTERFACE_ID AS SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT,
			CAST(ST_RT_CG1.SS_CODE AS CHAR(8)) AS SS_CD
		FROM $$STGDB.ST_XXCP_RT_INTERFACE_CG1 ST_RT_CG1

	) SXRI,
	(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CUSTOMS_TRX_KEY),0) AS MAX_KEY
	 FROM     $$ETLVWDB.SM_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION) SM
WHERE 1=1
	AND NOT EXISTS
	 ( SELECT 1
	   FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CUSTOMS_TRANSACTION SM1
	   WHERE  SXRI.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT = SM1.SK_VT_INTERFACE_ID_INT
				AND  SXRI.SS_CD = SM1.SS_CD
	 )
